curve_evolution.note: Longest common history for 20 contracts (Jun-26 → Feb-28). Back 3 contracts list later on Barchart.

mpc_meeting_pricing.note: Approximate meeting path from ICE 1M SONIA futures (not BoE-dated OIS / WIRP). Each meeting maps to the next month's contract as a post-decision rate proxy. Probabilities assume 25bp steps (FedWatch-style). Standard 1M futures can span multiple meetings — use Bloomberg WIRP for precise per-meeting OIS pricing.
